016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.mcp;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021import org.apache.juneau.bean.mcp.*;
022
023/**
024 * Aggregate configuration consumed by {@link McpDispatcher}.
025 *
026 * <p>
027 * Applications register a single {@link McpServerConfig} (typically as a bean in their {@code RestContext}
028 * bean store) listing the tools, prompts, and resources to expose, plus optional server metadata and a
029 * pagination strategy.
030 */
031public class McpServerConfig {
032
033   private Implementation serverInfo;
034   private String protocolVersion = McpProtocol.VERSION_2025_06_18;
035   private String instructions;
036   private List<McpToolHandler> tools = new ArrayList<>();
037   private List<McpPromptHandler> prompts = new ArrayList<>();
038   private List<McpResourceHandler> resources = new ArrayList<>();
039   private ServerCapabilities capabilities;
040   private McpCursor cursor = McpCursor.SINGLE_PAGE;
041
042   /**
043    * Server identity reported in {@code initialize}.
044    *
045    * <p>
046    * If {@code null}, {@link McpDispatcher} fills in {@code "juneau-rest-server-mcp" / "unknown"}.
047    *
048    * @return The server info, or {@code null} if not set.
049    */
050   public Implementation getServerInfo() {
051      return serverInfo;
052   }
053
054   /**
055    * Sets the server identity.
056    *
057    * @param serverInfo The new value.
058    * @return This object (for method chaining).
059    */
060   public McpServerConfig setServerInfo(Implementation serverInfo) {
061      this.serverInfo = serverInfo;
062      return this;
063   }
064
065   /**
066    * MCP protocol revision returned by {@code initialize}.
067    *
068    * @return The protocol version.
069    */
070   public String getProtocolVersion() {
071      return protocolVersion;
072   }
073
074   /**
075    * Sets the protocol revision.
076    *
077    * @param protocolVersion The new value.
078    * @return This object (for method chaining).
079    */
080   public McpServerConfig setProtocolVersion(String protocolVersion) {
081      this.protocolVersion = protocolVersion;
082      return this;
083   }
084
085   /**
086    * Optional instructions surfaced via {@code initialize}.
087    *
088    * @return The instructions, or {@code null} if not set.
089    */
090   public String getInstructions() {
091      return instructions;
092   }
093
094   /**
095    * Sets initialize instructions.
096    *
097    * @param instructions The new value.
098    * @return This object (for method chaining).
099    */
100   public McpServerConfig setInstructions(String instructions) {
101      this.instructions = instructions;
102      return this;
103   }
104
105   /**
106    * Registered tool handlers.
107    *
108    * @return Mutable list of handlers. Never {@code null}.
109    */
110   public List<McpToolHandler> getTools() {
111      return tools;
112   }
113
114   /**
115    * Sets the tool handler list.
116    *
117    * @param tools The new value (or {@code null} to clear).
118    * @return This object (for method chaining).
119    */
120   public McpServerConfig setTools(List<McpToolHandler> tools) {
121      this.tools = tools == null ? new ArrayList<>() : new ArrayList<>(tools);
122      return this;
123   }
124
125   /**
126    * Convenience: append one or more tool handlers.
127    *
128    * @param handlers Handlers to add.
129    * @return This object (for method chaining).
130    */
131   public McpServerConfig addTool(McpToolHandler... handlers) {
132      Collections.addAll(this.tools, handlers);
133      return this;
134   }
135
136   /**
137    * Registered prompt handlers.
138    *
139    * @return Mutable list of handlers. Never {@code null}.
140    */
141   public List<McpPromptHandler> getPrompts() {
142      return prompts;
143   }
144
145   /**
146    * Sets the prompt handler list.
147    *
148    * @param prompts The new value (or {@code null} to clear).
149    * @return This object (for method chaining).
150    */
151   public McpServerConfig setPrompts(List<McpPromptHandler> prompts) {
152      this.prompts = prompts == null ? new ArrayList<>() : new ArrayList<>(prompts);
153      return this;
154   }
155
156   /**
157    * Convenience: append one or more prompt handlers.
158    *
159    * @param handlers Handlers to add.
160    * @return This object (for method chaining).
161    */
162   public McpServerConfig addPrompt(McpPromptHandler... handlers) {
163      Collections.addAll(this.prompts, handlers);
164      return this;
165   }
166
167   /**
168    * Registered resource handlers.
169    *
170    * @return Mutable list of handlers. Never {@code null}.
171    */
172   public List<McpResourceHandler> getResources() {
173      return resources;
174   }
175
176   /**
177    * Sets the resource handler list.
178    *
179    * @param resources The new value (or {@code null} to clear).
180    * @return This object (for method chaining).
181    */
182   public McpServerConfig setResources(List<McpResourceHandler> resources) {
183      this.resources = resources == null ? new ArrayList<>() : new ArrayList<>(resources);
184      return this;
185   }
186
187   /**
188    * Convenience: append one or more resource handlers.
189    *
190    * @param handlers Handlers to add.
191    * @return This object (for method chaining).
192    */
193   public McpServerConfig addResource(McpResourceHandler... handlers) {
194      Collections.addAll(this.resources, handlers);
195      return this;
196   }
197
198   /**
199    * Optional explicit capabilities advertisement.
200    *
201    * <p>
202    * When {@code null}, {@link McpDispatcher} synthesizes one from the registered handler lists.
203    *
204    * @return The override, or {@code null} if auto-derived.
205    */
206   public ServerCapabilities getCapabilities() {
207      return capabilities;
208   }
209
210   /**
211    * Sets the explicit capabilities advertisement.
212    *
213    * @param capabilities The new value.
214    * @return This object (for method chaining).
215    */
216   public McpServerConfig setCapabilities(ServerCapabilities capabilities) {
217      this.capabilities = capabilities;
218      return this;
219   }
220
221   /**
222    * Pagination strategy for {@code list} dispatchers (tools / prompts / resources).
223    *
224    * @return The cursor. Never {@code null} (defaults to {@link McpCursor#SINGLE_PAGE}).
225    */
226   public McpCursor getCursor() {
227      return cursor;
228   }
229
230   /**
231    * Sets the pagination strategy.
232    *
233    * @param cursor The new value (or {@code null} to reset to {@link McpCursor#SINGLE_PAGE}).
234    * @return This object (for method chaining).
235    */
236   public McpServerConfig setCursor(McpCursor cursor) {
237      this.cursor = cursor == null ? McpCursor.SINGLE_PAGE : cursor;
238      return this;
239   }
240}
